artPrompt: A goblin enchanted mid-filibuster, cheeks puffed and face flushing red, a glowing aura of ember-orange wash swelling around its straining body in the wide frame, sparks and confetti suspended in the held-breath stillness against night-black smoke. A bonfire flickers behind the feral square. A comic burst of doomed determination, rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: Hold Your Breath for Democracy
text:
Enchant creature you control.
When Hold Your Breath for Democracy enters the battlefield, hold your breath. Enchanted creature has indestructible and can't be blocked for as long as you keep holding it.
The moment you breathe, speak, or laugh, the effect ends and you take 2 damage from the lightheadedness of power. Do not actually pass out for Whateverville. It isn't worth it. (It might be worth it.)
flavorText: The longest filibuster in city history lasted forty seconds.

extras.timing: for as long as you hold your breath
